name: QDM International Inc.
business: QDM International sells life and medical insurance and general insurance through its subsidiary YeeTah in Hong Kong, and also provides Mandatory Provident Fund intermediary services, primarily to Hong Kong residents and visitors from mainland China.

exposures.sentence: YeeTah sells a wide range of insurance products consisting of two major categories: (i) life and medical insurance, such as individual life insurance; and (ii) general insurance, such as automobile insurance, commercial property insurance, liability insurance and homeowner insurance.
